About Connectoo

We Make Dental Practices
Impossible to Ignore Online

Connectoo is a London-based digital marketing agency laser-focused on the healthcare sector. We understand that patients searching for a dentist in their area need to find you — not your competitors — and that trust is everything in healthcare.

Our team combines deep Local SEO expertise with healthcare compliance know-how, so every campaign we run is both effective and appropriate for regulated industries. From Google Business Profile optimisation to CQC-safe email marketing, we handle the digital side so you can focus on patient care.

  • ✓ Healthcare marketing specialists — we speak your language
  • ✓ Transparent monthly reporting with real KPIs
  • ✓ No lock-in contracts — results keep you with us
  • ✓ London-based team, available when you need us
Start Your Free Audit
What We Do

Three Pillars of Patient Growth

Every service is tailored to the realities of running a dental or healthcare practice in London.

📍

Local SEO Optimisation

Dominate "dentist near me" searches. We optimise your Google Business Profile, build local citations, manage reviews, and engineer your website to rank in the Map Pack for high-intent local keywords.

  • Google Business Profile management
  • Map Pack & organic rankings
  • Local citation building
  • Review generation campaigns
Most Popular
🔍

SEO Audits

A thorough, jargon-free audit of your entire online presence — from technical site health to competitor gap analysis — with a clear, prioritised action plan you can hand to any developer or we can execute for you.

  • Technical SEO health check
  • Competitor analysis & gap report
  • Content & keyword opportunity map
  • Prioritised 90-day action plan
✉️

Email Marketing

Re-activate dormant patients, promote new treatments, and keep your practice top-of-mind with beautifully designed, GDPR-compliant email campaigns built specifically for dental and healthcare audiences.

  • Patient reactivation sequences
  • Treatment promotion campaigns
  • GDPR & CQC compliant copy
  • A/B testing & performance tracking
Client Results

Real Practices, Real Growth

A snapshot of the outcomes we've delivered for London dental and healthcare clients.

Local SEO North London Dental Practice
+340% organic search traffic in 6 months

Moved from page 4 to position #2 in the Map Pack for "dentist Islington". New patient enquiries tripled within the first quarter.

Google Business Profile Citation Building On-Page SEO
Email Marketing Cosmetic Dental Clinic · Chelsea
£28k revenue from a single reactivation campaign

A 3-email sequence sent to lapsed patients generated 47 booked consultations for composite bonding and whitening treatments.

Patient Reactivation Segmentation A/B Testing
SEO Audit Orthodontic Group · South London
+190% increase in "Invisalign London" impressions

Our audit uncovered 23 critical technical issues and a major keyword gap. Implementing our 90-day plan doubled online enquiries within two months.

Technical Audit Competitor Analysis Content Strategy
Local SEO + Email Multi-Site Dental Group · East London
4 × #1 Map Pack rankings across 4 London boroughs

Full-stack campaign covering four practice locations — each achieved top Map Pack position within 5 months, supported by monthly patient newsletters.

Multi-Location SEO Monthly Newsletters Review Management
Email Marketing Private GP Clinic · Central London
58% average email open rate (industry avg: 21%)

Designed and deployed a 12-month wellness email calendar covering seasonal health tips, new services, and patient education — fully GDPR compliant.

Healthcare Email GDPR Compliance Content Calendar
SEO Audit Implant Specialist · West London
+£65k additional implant revenue in year one

Identified untapped implant keyword opportunities and technical barriers blocking Google crawling. Post-implementation, the practice ranked for 140 new terms.

Keyword Research Technical Fixes Landing Pages
How It Works

From Audit to Results in 3 Steps

01

Free SEO Audit

We analyse your website, Google Business Profile, and local competition — then present a clear report with quick wins and long-term opportunities.

02

Custom Strategy

We build a tailored growth plan aligned to your practice goals, budget, and target treatments — no cookie-cutter packages.

03

Execute & Report

We implement, monitor, and send you plain-English monthly reports showing exactly what moved and what it means for your practice.
